name: Conformed Dimensions Across Fact Tables
description: Build two fact tables that share conformed dimensions, then drill across them

checks.name: fact_sales_conf has 4 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_sales_conf;

checks.name: fact_returns_conf has 2 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_returns_conf;

checks.name: January Gadgets sales = 100
checks.query: SELECT SUM(f.revenue) AS n FROM fact_sales_conf f JOIN dim_product_conf p ON f.product_id = p.product_id JOIN dim_date_conf d ON f.sale_date = d.date_key WHERE p.category = 'Gadgets' AND d.month = 1;
checks.description: Only Widget A sold in January (Gadgets category): revenue = 100

checks.name: February Gadgets sales = 200
checks.query: SELECT SUM(f.revenue) AS n FROM fact_sales_conf f JOIN dim_product_conf p ON f.product_id = p.product_id JOIN dim_date_conf d ON f.sale_date = d.date_key WHERE p.category = 'Gadgets' AND d.month = 2;
checks.description: Widget A (150) + Widget C (50) sold in February (both Gadgets): revenue = 200
